answer:
The resonance frequency for an electron spin is given by the Larmor equation \( f = \frac{g \mu_B B}{h} \), where \( g \approx 2.0023 \), \( \mu_B = 9.274 \times 10^{-24} \, \text{J/T} \), and \( h = 6.626 \times 10^{-34} \, \text{J·s} \). For \( B = 1.0 \, \text{kT} = 1000 \, \text{T} \), this yields \( f \approx 2.8 \times 10^{13} \, \text{Hz} \).  

\boxed{F}
